componentDescription: DateRangePicker provides a calendar UI for selecting a start and end date range. Use for reporting date ranges, booking windows, filter periods, and scheduling. For single date selection, use a standard date picker.
features: Calendar UI for selecting start and end dates

usageExamples.title: Report date range filter
usageExamples.description: Date range picker for filtering analytics data.
usageExamples.code:
<DateRangePicker
  label="Date range"
  value={dateRange}
  onChange={setDateRange}
  placeholder="Select date range"
  maxDate={new Date()}
/>

usageExamples.title: Booking window selection
usageExamples.description: Date range for hotel or rental booking with min/max constraints.
usageExamples.code:
<DateRangePicker
  label="Stay dates"
  value={bookingDates}
  onChange={setBookingDates}
  placeholder="Check-in → Check-out"
  minDate={new Date()}
  maxDate={addDays(new Date(), 365)}
  disabled={isSubmitting}
/>

usageExamples.title: Date range with error state
usageExamples.description: Required date range with validation error.
usageExamples.code:
<DateRangePicker
  label="Project timeline"
  value={timeline}
  onChange={setTimeline}
  placeholder="Start date → End date"
  error={!timeline && submitted}
/>

value.llmContext: Required. Object with from (start Date) and to (end Date) properties. Both can be null/undefined for no selection. Manage with useState({ from: null, to: null }). Check that from <= to before submitting.
value.propDescription: Required. Current date range { from: Date, to: Date }

onChange.llmContext: Required. Called with the new { from, to } date range object when the user selects dates. The range is built interactively — from is set on first click, to on second click.
onChange.propDescription: Required. Called with new date range on selection

minDate.llmContext: The earliest selectable date. Dates before this are shown as disabled in the calendar. Use new Date() to prevent selecting past dates (e.g., for future bookings).

maxDate.llmContext: The latest selectable date. Dates after this are disabled. Use new Date() to prevent selecting future dates for reporting date ranges where data doesn't exist yet.

error.llmContext: Set to true for validation errors — e.g., required field not filled, range too long, or end date before start date.
error.propDescription: Shows error styling on the date picker

disabled.llmContext: Set to true to prevent date selection — use during form submission or when the date range is determined by external factors.
